flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas-Fort Smith rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.8k → $7.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Arkansas-Fort Smith rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.2k → $18.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas-Fort Smith fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Arkansas-Fort Smith rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (33.4% → 37.9%).
